title: Add transaction history list

requirements.text: Create a backend function that returns all buy and sell transactions for the authenticated user, including: asset symbol, company name, transaction type (buy/sell), number of shares, price per share, transaction date/time, and total value
acceptanceCriteria: Backend returns a list of all transactions (both purchases and sales)
Each transaction includes: symbol, name, type, quantity, price, timestamp, total value
Transactions are ordered by date (newest first)
Only returns transactions for the authenticated user

requirements.text: Display a transaction history panel in a separate section below the existing features (below the archived holdings panel) showing all buy and sell transactions with columns for: stock symbol, company name, transaction type (Buy/Sell badge), number of shares, price per share, date/time, and total value
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction list appears as a new section below archived holdings
Displays all transactions in a table format with clear column headers
Buy transactions are visually distinguished from sell transactions (e.g., colored badges)
Shows formatted dates, currency values, and share quantities
Transactions are sorted by date with newest first

constraints: Do not modify the existing HoldingsPanel, ArchivedHoldingsPanel, or other existing components
Maintain the current portfolio calculation logic
Keep all authentication and authorization patterns intact
nonGoals: Filtering or searching the transaction list
Adding pagination to the transaction list
